sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115280" key="yakadisxi/ois" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψᾰκαδ-ισχίοις</orth> (dat. pl.), <sense id="n115280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with dappled haunches</tr_>(?), of horses, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
